# HELP dnsmon_queries_total Total DNS responses observed by dnsmon.
# TYPE dnsmon_queries_total counter
dnsmon_queries_total{namespace="default",pod="checkout-7bd",domain="payments.example.com",server="10.96.0.10",rcode="NOERROR"} 142
# HELP dnsmon_latency_seconds DNS query to response latency by pod, domain and server.
# TYPE dnsmon_latency_seconds histogram
dnsmon_latency_seconds_bucket{namespace="default",pod="checkout-7bd",domain="payments.example.com",server="10.96.0.10",le="0.05"} 100
# HELP dnsmon_nxdomain_total DNS NXDOMAIN responses observed by dnsmon.
# TYPE dnsmon_nxdomain_total counter
dnsmon_nxdomain_total{namespace="default",pod="api-6ff",domain="does-not-exist.example.com",server="10.96.0.10"} 23
